subcodes.first_line: This Wronged One hath, during the nights and days, summoned the peoples of the earth unto the divine horizon, and amidst these [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم در لیالی و ایام اهل ارض را بافق الهی دعوت نمود و بلایائی را در این
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the power of words; of speech, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
